description: Renovate configuration for mifos-platform-bom. Renovate opens PRs to bump versions in gradle.properties. Each bump triggers the Verify BOM CI workflow, which resolves all dependencies and runs the javax.* purity check before the PR is merged.

packageRules.description: Group Spring Boot upgrades — Spring Boot BOM governs ~100 transitive dependencies, so bumps must be reviewed together.
Group Apache Camel upgrades — Camel BOM governs all camel-* modules.
Group Zeebe / Camunda upgrades — zeebe-client-java and spring-zeebe-starter must stay in sync.
Group Jakarta EE API upgrades — all jakarta.* APIs must remain compatible with Spring Boot's managed versions.
Automerge patch-level updates for testing libraries (JUnit, Mockito).
